summary: Tested new features: SSO status/URL endpoints, Price History recording/retrieval, What-If Simulation, and Multi-Site Management. All 18 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Fixed bug in Simulation.jsx (wrong API endpoint).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working correctly. SSO endpoints return disabled status by default (google_enabled:false, microsoft_enabled:false). SSO URL endpoints return 400 when not configured. Price history recording works for recipes and materials. What-if simulation works with material price changes. Sites CRUD works with auto-seeded default site. Fixed Simulation.jsx to use /api/materials instead of /api/raw-materials.

sso_endpoints.GET /api/auth/sso/google/url: PASS - Returns 400 when SSO not configured
sso_endpoints.GET /api/auth/sso/microsoft/url: PASS - Returns 400 when SSO not configured

price_history.POST /api/price-history/record: PASS - Records price history for all recipes (requires manager/admin)

simulation_what_if.POST /api/simulation/what-if: PASS - Returns simulation results with impacts

frontend_login_page.sso_buttons_hidden: PASS - SSO buttons correctly hidden when SSO is disabled

frontend_simulation_page.page_loads: PASS - Simulation page loads with title and form
frontend_simulation_page.run_simulation: PASS - Simulation runs and shows results table with impacted recipes

frontend_settings_page.sites_tab: PASS - Sites tab shows CRUD for production sites with default site
frontend_settings_page.sso_tab: PASS - SSO tab shows Google and Microsoft config sections with checkboxes

sidebar_navigation.simulation_menu: PASS - Simulation menu item present in sidebar

bug_fixed.issue: Simulation page was calling /api/raw-materials which doesn't exist
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to /api/materials which is the correct endpoint
